data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Lower As Traders Await Slew Of Data: US-Listed Chinese Stocks In Focus Following Stimulus Pledge
data.description: US stock futures declined on Tuesday as dollar rose to 106.357 level. Expectations of a December rate cut increased to 86.1%. Negative breadth in S&P 500 continued for sixth day.

data.title: Rivian Stock Surges Over 11% After Analyst Says It Is 'Well-Positioned To Gain Significant Share'
data.description: Equity research analyst Mickey Legg initiated coverage on EV startup Rivian with a buy rating and $18 price target, citing market potential.

data.title: Jeff Bezos' Amazon Secures Exclusive Warhammer 40,000 Rights, Expands Into Gaming And Fantasy Content
data.description: Amazon.com Inc. has finalized an agreement with Games Workshop Group for exclusive rights to adapt the popular Warhammer 40,000 universe into films and television series, the British gaming company announced Tuesday.

data.title: Why C3.ai Shares Are Trading Higher By Around 8%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
Google-Meta Under Fire: EU Watchdog Reportedly Probes Alleged Secret Ad Deal Targeting Teen Users
data.description: The investigation, internally dubbed "Tangerine Owl," uncovered that Google employees had advised Meta on how to bypass Google's ad policies for minors.
